def solve(prices, strategy, k)
  n = prices.length
  B = Array.new(n) { |i| strategy[i] * prices[i] }
  A = Array.new(n) { |i| (1 - strategy[i]) * prices[i] }
  
  prefixA = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  prefixB = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
  
  (0...n).each do |i|
    prefixA[i+1] = prefixA[i] + A[i]
    prefixB[i+1] = prefixB[i] + B[i]
  end
  
  max_delta = 0
  first_half = k / 2
  (0..(n - k)).each do |i|
    sum_A_second = prefixA[i + k] - prefixA[i + first_half]
    sum_B_first = prefixB[i + first_half] - prefixB[i]
    delta = sum_A_second - sum_B_first
    max_delta = delta if delta > max_delta
  end
  
  original_profit = prefixB[n]
  result = original_profit + max_delta
  result
end

#include <vector>

using namespace std;

long long solve(vector<long long> prices, vector<long long> strategy, long long k) {

    int n = prices.size();

    vector<long long> A(n);

    vector<long long> B(n);

    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {

        B[i] = strategy[i] * prices[i];

        A[i] = (1 - strategy[i]) * prices[i];

    }

    vector<long long> prefixA(n + 1, 0);

    vector<long long> prefixB(n + 1, 0);

    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {

        prefixA[i + 1] = prefixA[i] + A[i];

        prefixB[i + 1] = prefixB[i] + B[i];

    }

    long long max_delta = 0;

    int first_half = k / 2;

    for (int i = 0; i <= n - k; ++i) {

        long long end = i + k;

        long long sum_A_second = prefixA[end] - prefixA[i + first_half];

        long long sum_B_first = prefixB[i + first_half] - prefixB[i];

        long long delta = sum_A_second - sum_B_first;

        if (delta > max_delta) {

            max_delta = delta;

        }

    }

    long long original_profit = prefixB[n];
